metadata.description: Open-source agentic coding plugins by Inferal

plugins.name: derisk
plugins.description: Validate assumptions in plans before execution: Socratic risk discovery, hypothesis testing, evidence-backed amendments

plugins.name: pair
plugins.description: Decide who writes what: classify plan steps as AI-written or developer-written based on importance and complexity

plugins.name: verify
plugins.description: Establish an evidence chain for claims: Socratic decomposition, tiered source credibility, empirical tests when possible, re-runnable packages
